name: Turkey Picadillo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb ground turkey or chicken (about 1 cup packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and bell pepper; sauté until softened, about 7 minutes.
3. Add turkey and cook, stirring, until it changes color, about 3 or 4 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatoes, oregano, salt, pepper, and raisins. Bring to a boil and simmer over medium heat for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Picadillo can be kept, covered, in the refrigerator for up to 2 days. Serve hot. Use as a filling for stuffed peppers, tamales, tortillas, or empanadas. It can also be served by itself accompanied by rice or tortillas. Makes 2 servings (4 servings with tortillas).
